info.DAtuviSezaH: DAtoH OpadeSikasvarUpe vidyamAnaH ikAraH uccAraRArTaH jYeyaH
info.english_meaning: to kill to destroy to damage to hurt
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAm pfTag rUpeRa nEva pAWyate  parantu tatra 5.37 df ityatra 'fkzItyeka evAjAdirityanye' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti
